title: Claude Plans, Gemini Designs: One Workflow for Beautiful Frontends (LIVE)
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates a multi-model AI coding workflow combining Claude Opus for planning and integration, Gemini 3.5 Flash for UI design, and Archon orchestration to build frontends. The author argues Gemini produces the most beautiful UIs while Opus handles complex logic and deployment tasks best.
